<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-harness -->

# Task Workspace Contract

## Default Task Workspace

All task-scoped artifacts MUST live under:

```text
.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/
```

Use this for diagnostics, probes, prompts, plans, reports, verification output,
subagent sidecars, scratch analysis, and task-local lessons. Product artifacts
and user-named target paths remain outside only when they are the actual
deliverable.

## Atomic Task ID Allocation

Agents MUST allocate task IDs with the harness allocator:

```bash
.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>
```

The allocator uses a slug-free `.ai/tasks/.locks/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{NNN}` `mkdir`
lock. Agents MUST NOT list existing task dirs and pick the next number
themselves; list-then-pick is not parallel-safe.

## Per-Session Sentinel

Each agent session MUST publish its own sentinel atomically:

```text
.ai/runtime/current-task/{session_id}.json
```

Required fields:

- `task_id`: `YYYY-MM-DD-NNN`
- `slug`: lowercase kebab-case
- `task_root`: `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}`
- `phase`: `1` through `8`
- `preflight_complete`: `true`
- `session_id`: matches the sentinel filename

The legacy singleton `.ai/runtime/current-task.json` is inert compatibility
residue. Agents MUST NOT use it for authority and MUST NOT delete it during
harness updates.

## Manifest Contract

Every task root MUST contain `manifest.json` with at least:

```json
{
  "task_id": "YYYY-MM-DD-NNN",
  "slug": "kebab-slug",
  "task_root": ".ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}",
  "allowed_external_paths": []
}
```

`allowed_external_paths` authorizes exact absolute external paths for THIS
session only. The guard never scans all manifests and never grants authority
from another session's task.

## Guard Behavior

`.ai/harness/hooks/task-workspace-guard.sh` is path-derived and per-session:

- in-project structural paths are allowed: `.ai/harness/`, `.ai/memory/`,
  `.ai/runtime/`, `.ai/tasks/`, `.claude/`, `.cursor/`, `.gemini/`, `.codex/`
- task-process folders outside `.ai/tasks/` are flagged:
  `diagnostics/`, `verification/`, `reports/`, `prompts/`, `scratch/`,
  `analysis/`, and `probes/`
- external absolute paths are authorized only against this session's
  `allowed_external_paths`
- missing `session_id` degrades permissively to avoid false-blocking runtimes
  that cannot identify the actor

This contract is designed for multiple concurrent agents in one local checkout.
Cross-machine concurrency through Dropbox or iCloud sync is out of scope because
those systems do not preserve local `mkdir`/rename atomicity guarantees.
